Terms of Service

Professional Amazon reinstatement services terms and conditions

Effective Date: August 7, 2025

Welcome to AppealPartners.com

By accessing our website and/or purchasing our services, you agree to the following Terms of Service. Please read them carefully as they contain important information about your rights and obligations when using our Amazon seller consulting and appeal services.

1. Service Description

AppealPartners.com provides consulting and support services for Amazon sellers. This includes preparing appeal letters, providing guidance, and advising on strategy to address account or ASIN suspensions or deactivations. We are not affiliated with Amazon.com, Inc. or any of its subsidiaries. We do not have control over Amazon's internal decisions or appeal outcomes.

2. No Guarantee of Results

We provide professional assistance only. While we apply industry experience and best practices, we do not and cannot guarantee the reinstatement of any Amazon account or ASIN. All services are offered on a best-effort basis. You are paying for our time, expertise, and work—not for a specific outcome.

3. Client Responsibilities

You agree to provide accurate and complete information regarding your Amazon account, performance notifications, and any prior appeal history. Failure to do so may limit the effectiveness of our services. You understand that misleading, false, or incomplete information may negatively impact your appeal and does not entitle you to a refund.

4. Payments and Refund Policy

All payments made to AppealPartners.com are final and non-refundable once submitted. We do not issue refunds based on dissatisfaction with the result or denial by Amazon.

5. Chargebacks and Disputes

By purchasing our services, you agree not to file a chargeback or payment dispute with your bank, credit card issuer, or payment provider on the basis of dissatisfaction with the outcome. Attempting to reverse a valid payment after receiving services constitutes fraud and may result in legal action and reporting to appropriate authorities or payment processors.

6. Confidentiality

We treat your case information and account details with strict confidentiality. We do not share your data with third parties unless required by law or authorized by you.

7. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, AppealPartners.com is not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our services, including but not limited to lost profits, account termination, or business interruption.

8. Contact Information

If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at: sales@appealpartners.com https://appealpartners.com

Terms Complete

All terms and conditions have been provided. These Terms of Service are now complete and comprehensive, covering all aspects of our Amazon seller consulting and reinstatement services.

Emergency Suspension?

If your Amazon account has been suspended and you need immediate assistance, don't wait. Our emergency response team is available to help you get back to selling quickly.

Emergency Hotline: +1 (718) 668-4216Email: Sales@appealpartners.com
